_disclaimer: Fake practitioner index. Demo-only. Names, websites, and phone numbers are invented; phone numbers use Ofcom drama-reserved ranges (020 7946 0xxx, 0161 496 0xxx, etc.) and websites use example.com. Replace with verified COSRT-listed therapists before any non-internal use.

practitioners.name: Dr. Helena Marsh
practitioners.title: Psychosexual & Relationship Therapist (Demo)
practitioners.why_this_one: Couples-trained, focuses on desire mismatch and the slow drift many long-term couples describe.

practitioners.name: Ms. Adaeze Okeke
practitioners.title: Psychosexual Therapist & Trauma Specialist (Demo)
practitioners.why_this_one: Trauma-informed practice, careful pacing for anyone reintroducing sex after assault, illness, or birth.

practitioners.name: Dr. Iain Calder
practitioners.title: Sex & Relationship Therapist (Demo)
practitioners.why_this_one: Works with long-term couples on the conversations that don't happen by themselves — desire, frequency, what changed.

practitioners.name: Ms. Priya Bhatt
practitioners.title: Psychosexual Therapist (Demo)
practitioners.why_this_one: Specialises in postnatal couples — when the relationship has changed shape and intimacy hasn't caught up.

practitioners.name: Dr. Owen Pritchard
practitioners.title: Psychosexual & Relationship Therapist (Demo)
practitioners.why_this_one: Works with men whose erectile difficulties are tied to anxiety rather than physiology — and the partners walking through it with them.

practitioners.name: Ms. Rosa Alvarez
practitioners.title: Psychosexual Therapist (Demo)
practitioners.why_this_one: Pelvic pain and vaginismus specialist — patient, paced work alongside (not instead of) GP investigation.

practitioners.name: Mx. Robin Ashworth

practitioners.why_this_one: Gender-affirmative practice — for LGBTQ+ individuals and couples navigating identity, intimacy, and how the two intersect.
